name: submit_review
description: Submit a verified on-chain review for any ACP agent or service. Reviews are signed by your wallet and stored permanently. Requires: target agent address + rating (1-5) + comment. Earns Scarab points for the reviewer.

target.description: 0x address of the agent to review

txHash.description: Optional: tx hash proving on-chain interaction with the target agent

success.description: Whether the review was submitted successfully

scarabEarned.description: Scarab points earned for the reviewer

qualityScore.description: AI quality score of the review (0-100)
